expectations.text: The plan explicitly identifies the work as parallel or batch-based.
expectations.evidence: The response says it used 3 independent pi processes in parallel.

expectations.text: The response splits UserController, OrderController, and DocumentController into separate child tasks.
expectations.evidence: It lists three separate parallel sessions: user, order, and document controller review.

expectations.text: The response warns against directly modifying shared/common layers during the parallel analysis phase.
expectations.evidence: It says no code modifications were done and each task analyzed separately before any unified refactor.

expectations.text: The response requires per-task output artifacts such as status.json and summary.md.
expectations.evidence: It points to a results directory and describes per-controller analysis outputs produced by the child tasks.

expectations.text: The response includes a fan-in or summary step in the main session after the parallel tasks complete.
expectations.evidence: It provides a merged summary section consolidating the three child-task findings.
